---
title: "Research Objective: Working Draft"
author: "Michelle Diaz"
format: html
---

## Research Objective

This section is in progress as our group finalizes our dataset selection. Our group is currently evaluating two dataset options: a customer marketing response dataset (demographic and purchase history data) and the H&M Personalized Fashion Recommendations dataset (customer, product, and transaction data from a real-world retail brand). Once finalized, this section will state my specific research objective, including the independent and dependent variables I plan to investigate.

## Planned IV's and DV's

- Independent variable(s): to be finalized pending dataset decision
- Dependent variable(s): to be finalized pending dataset decision

## Data Wrangling Plan

Initial data wrangling will include importing the raw data file(s), checking for missing values and inconsistent categories, and standardizing variable formats before analysis.

## Data Visualization Plan
ß
Planned visualizations will depend on the final variables selected, but will likely include distribution plots for key variables and comparison plots across relevant groups.


## Github Repo 
https://github.com/MichelleeeDiazzz/IBM-6540-Group-Project-
